result.summary: The page is visually stable with only minor spacing and contrast adjustments recommended for optimal presentation.

issues.description: The state name 'PENNSYLVANIA' under the main logo is styled in a small, plain font that feels slightly detached from the main branding header.
issues.suggestion: Integrate the state name more cleanly into the header branding lockup to improve visual hierarchy.

issues.description: Small dark overlay circles with the 'i' information icon on game thumbnails have low contrast against some dark background images.
issues.suggestion: Add a subtle light border or slightly increase the opacity of the information icon background for better visibility.
